assignments.name: Update_Employee_Size_and_SW_Industry
assignments.label: Update Employee Size and SW Industry

decisions.name: FCCU_Owner_Role_not_Admin_or_Director_MIR
decisions.label: FCCU - Owner Role not Admin or Director MIR?

decisions.name: Fit_Score_and_Intent_Compare_ISNULL
decisions.label: Fit Score and Intent Compare ISNULL?

rules.name: Yes_Fit_Score_changed_to_S
rules.label: Yes, Fit Score changed to S

decisions.name: NextRule_Please_use_should_update_for_DMLs
decisions.label: NextRule (Please use ShouldUpdate var for lead DMLs)

decisions.description: MIS-5460 - Update for changes in fit score
decisions.name: Rule_FCCU_Found_Closed_CU_Task
decisions.label: *Rule (FCCU)* - Found Closed CU Task?

decisions.description: MIS-7371 - Added FitScore E to Lead Logic MIS-5460 - Update for changes in fit score
decisions.name: Rule_FSI_Fit_Score_ISCHANGED_to_ABCD
decisions.label: *Rule (FSI)* - Fit Score ISCHANGED to ABCD?

rules.name: FSI_Fit_Score_ISCHANGED_to_ABCD
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND (2 OR 3 OR 4 OR 5 OR (6 AND 7 AND 8)) AND (9 OR 10 OR 11 OR 12 OR 13)
rules.label: FSI - Fit Score ISCHANGED to ABCD

Flow.description: MIS-8337 - Fixed fr_body_for_log formula MIS-8114 - Merged DMLs, Moved BI Data creation here MIS-7958 - Added FitScore S handling MIS-7371 - Added FitScore E to Lead Logic MIS-6878 - FitScore Log Updates MIS-6893 - Exclude Admin and Director MIR from CU Emails MIS-6372 - Department Update from FitScore Flow MIS-6637 - FitScore Calc Before First MQL Date MIS-6546 - First MQL Date 2.0 - Year 2100 fix MIS-6336 - First MQL Date 2.0 MIS-6259 - MQL Notifications Update 2 MIS-6255 - MQL Notifications Update MIS-6227 - First MQL Date Update MIS-5743 - Soft/Hard MQL Status notification MIS-5784 - Update converted contact status MIS-5529 - mql date MIS-5460 - Update for changes in fit score MIS-5503 - owner logic update MIS-5459 - removed status = 'unqualified upon creation' on owner change MIS-4891 MIS-4679

formulas.description: if fit score is latest → take fit score if intent_first_medium_date__c or intent_first_high_date__c) is later than SW Fit score timestamp → take the earliest between intent_first_medium_date__c or intent_first_high_date__c
formulas.name: Fit_Score_Intent_Compare
fr_body_for_log
formulas.expression: " Business_Unit__c = " + text({!$Record.Business_Unit__c})+", "+ " Clean_Domain__c = " + ({!$Record.Clean_Domain__c})+", "+ " Country = " + ({!$Record.Country})+", "+ " CountryCode = " + text({!$Record.CountryCode})+", "+ " Department__c = " + {!Var_Save_Department}+", "+ " Calculated_Department = "+ {!Get_FitScore.Var_Department}+", "+ " Department_Other_Description__c = " + ({!$Record.Department_Other_Description__c})+", "+ " Email_Address_Domain_Type__c = " + text({!$Record.Email_address_domain_type__c})+", "+ " Email_Address_Domain_Type_Details__c = " + ({!$Record.Email_Address_Domain_Type_Details__c})+", "+ " Employees_Min__c = " + text({!$Record.Employees_Min__c})+", "+ " Lead Source = " + text({!$Record.LeadSource})+", "+ " Quiz Data Incomplete = " + {!$Record.Quiz_Data_Incomplete__c}+", "+ " ROE_Division__c = " + ({!$Record.ROE_Division__c})+", "+ " Secondary_email__c = " + ({!$Record.Secondary_email__c})+", "+ " Seniority__c = " + {!Var_Save_Seniority}+", "+ " Calculated_Seniority = " + {!Get_FitScore.Var_Seniority}+", "+ " SI Enrichment Visit = " + text({!$Record.SI_Enrichment_Visits__c})+", "+ " SW_Industry__c = " + {!Var_Save_SW_Industry}+", "+ " Calculated_SW_Industry = " + {!Get_FitScore.Var_SW_Industry}+", "+ " Title = " + ({!$Record.Title})+", "+ " Use_of_Similarweb__c = " + text({!$Record.Use_of_Similarweb__c})+", "+ " Website = " + ({!$Record.Website})+", "+ " LinkedIn Profile = " + ({!$Record.LinkedIn_Profile__c})+", "+ " LinkedIn = " + ({!$Record.LinkedIn__c})+", "+ " Website = " + ({!$Record.Website})+", "+ " SI_Enrichment_Visits__c = " + text({!$Record.SI_Enrichment_Visits__c})+", "+ " sw_connector_Total Monthly Visits = " + text({!$Record.sw_connector__swId__r.sw_connector__Visits__c})+", "+ " Clean Domain = " + ({!$Record.Clean_Domain__c})+", "+ " ROE_Division__c = " + ({!$Record.ROE_Division__c})

formulas.name: fr_cause_for_log
formulas.expression: IF( ISNEW(), 'Record is new first time getting Fit Score', IF( ischanged({!$Record.Country }), 'Country changed from ' + {!$Record__Prior.Country} + " to " + {!$Record.Country}, IF( ischanged({!$Record.CountryCode }), 'CountryCode changed from ' + text({!$Record__Prior.CountryCode}) + " to " + text({!$Record.CountryCode}), IF( ischanged({!$Record.Department__c}), 'department__c changed from ' + text({!$Record.Department__c}) + " to " + {!Get_FitScore.Var_Department}, IF( ischanged({!$Record.Department_Other_Description__c }), 'Department_Other_Description__c changed from ' + {!$Record__Prior.Department_Other_Description__c} + " to " + {!$Record.Department_Other_Description__c}, IF( ischanged({!$Record.Employees_Min__c}), 'employees_min__c changed from ' + text({!$Record__Prior.Employees_Min__c}) + " to " + text({!$Record.Employees_Min__c}), IF( ischanged({!$Record.Email_address_domain_type__c }), 'Email_address_domain_type__c changed from ' + text({!$Record__Prior.Email_address_domain_type__c}) + " to " + text({!$Record.Email_address_domain_type__c}), IF( ischanged({!$Record.Email_Address_Domain_Type_Details__c }), 'Email_Address_Domain_Type_Details__c changed from ' + {!$Record__Prior.Email_Address_Domain_Type_Details__c} + " to " + {!$Record.Email_Address_Domain_Type_Details__c}, IF( ischanged({!$Record.Clean_Domain__c }), 'Clean_Domain__c changed from ' + {!$Record__Prior.Clean_Domain__c} + " to " + {!$Record.Clean_Domain__c}, IF( ischanged({!$Record.SW_Industry__c}), 'sw_industry__c changed from ' + text({!$Record__Prior.SW_Industry__c}) + " to " + text({!$Record.SW_Industry__c}), IF( ischanged({!$Record.Business_Unit__c }), 'Business_Unit__c changed from ' + text({!$Record__Prior.Business_Unit__c}) + " to " + text({!$Record.Business_Unit__c}), IF( ischanged({!$Record.Secondary_email__c }), 'Secondary_email__c changed from ' + {!$Record__Prior.Secondary_email__c} + " to " + {!$Record.Secondary_email__c}, IF( ischanged({!$Record.Website }), 'website changed from ' + {!$Record__Prior.Website} + " to " + {!$Record.Website}, IF( ischanged({!$Record.Title }), 'Title changed from ' + {!$Record__Prior.Title} + " to " + {!$Record.Title}, IF( ischanged({!$Record.Use_of_Similarweb__c }), 'Use_of_Similarweb__c changed from ' + text({!$Record__Prior.Use_of_Similarweb__c}) + " to " + text({!$Record.Use_of_Similarweb__c}), IF( ischanged({!$Record.Seniority__c }), 'Seniority__c changed from ' + text({!$Record__Prior.Seniority__c}) + " to " + text({!$Record.Seniority__c}), IF( ischanged({!$Record.Quiz_Data_Incomplete__c}), 'Quiz_Data_Incomplete__c changed to ' + {!$Record.Quiz_Data_Incomplete__c}, Null ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) )

Flow.label: Lead after save

recordUpdates.description: MIS-5460 - Update for changes in fit score

textTemplates.name: Reassigned_CU_Task_Email_Body
textTemplates.text:
New CU has been submitted:

CU Details:
Status: {!Get_Latest_CU_Task.Status} Due Date: {!Get_Latest_CU_Task.ActivityDate}
CU Type: {!Get_Latest_CU_Task.CU_Type_formula__c}
Subject: {!Get_Latest_CU_Task.Subject}
Message: {!Get_Latest_CU_Task.Description}
Form Location URL: {!Get_Latest_CU_Task.Form_Location_URL__c}

Lead Details:
Name: {!$Record.FirstName} {!$Record.LastName}
Email: {!$Record.Email}
Phone: {!$Record.Phone}
Current Registration Type: {!$Record.Current_Registration_Type__c}
Fit Score: {!$Record.SW_Fit_Score__c}
Department: {!$Record.Department__c}
Title: {!$Record.Title}
How to Contact: {!$Record.how_to_contact_user_primary__c}
LinkedIn Profile: {!$Record.LinkedIn_Profile__c}
Website Domain: {!$Record.Website_Domain__c}

Company Details:
Company: {!$Record.Company}
Country: {!$Record.Country}
SW Industry: {!$Record.SW_Industry__c}

textTemplates.name: Reassinged_CU_Email_Subject
textTemplates.text: You have a new CU by {!Get_Latest_CU_Task.Email__c} from Company: {!$Record.Company}

textTemplates.description: MIS-5460 - Update for changes in fit score
textTemplates.name: Reopened_CU_Task_Email_Body
textTemplates.text:
New CU has been submitted:

CU Details:
Status: Submitted Due Date: {!Get_Latest_Closed_CU_Task.ActivityDate}
CU Type: {!Get_Latest_Closed_CU_Task.CU_Type_formula__c}
Subject: {!Get_Latest_Closed_CU_Task.Subject}
Message: {!Get_Latest_Closed_CU_Task.Description}
Form Location URL: {!Get_Latest_Closed_CU_Task.Form_Location_URL__c}

Lead Details:
Name: {!$Record.FirstName} {!$Record.LastName}
Email: {!$Record.Email}
Phone: {!$Record.Phone}
Current Registration Type: {!$Record.Current_Registration_Type__c}
Fit Score: {!$Record.SW_Fit_Score__c}
Department: {!$Record.Department__c}
Title: {!$Record.Title}
How to Contact: {!$Record.how_to_contact_user_primary__c}
LinkedIn Profile: {!$Record.LinkedIn_Profile__c}
Website Domain: {!$Record.Website_Domain__c}

Company Details:
Company: {!$Record.Company}
Country: {!$Record.Country}
SW Industry: {!$Record.SW_Industry__c}

textTemplates.description: MIS-5460 - Update for changes in fit score
textTemplates.name: Reopened_CU_Task_Email_Subject
textTemplates.text: You have a new CU by {!Get_Latest_Closed_CU_Task.Email__c} from Company: {!$Record.Company}

textTemplates.name: Soft_Hard_MQL_Notification_Body
textTemplates.text: The Lead {!$Record.FirstName} {!$Record.LastName} has received {!$Record.mql_status__c} Status. Please reach out ASAP!
